grunt_quote_10: Wherever there is light, there is also shadow.
grunt_quote_11: Wherever there is light, there is also shadow.
grunt_quote_16: This buff physique isn’t just for show!
grunt_quote_17: This buff physique isn’t just for show!
grunt_quote_18: Do you know how hot Pokémon fire breath can get?
grunt_quote_19: Do you know how hot Pokémon fire breath can get?
grunt_quote_24: You’ll be defeated into the ground!
grunt_quote_25: You’ll be defeated into the ground!
grunt_quote_26: You’re gonna be frozen in your tracks.
grunt_quote_27: You’re gonna be frozen in your tracks.
grunt_quote_28: You’re no match for my iron will!
grunt_quote_29: You’re no match for my iron will!
grunt_quote_34: Are you scared of psychics that use unseen power?
grunt_quote_35: Are you scared of psychics that use unseen power?
grunt_quote_41: My strength comes from my loyalty to Team GO Rocket.
grunt_quote_41_2: I will do anything and everything for Team GO Rocket.
grunt_quote_41_3: I owe the boss my life. I’d do anything for him.
grunt_quote_41_4: Team GO Rocket saved me. It’s time to return the favor!
grunt_quote_41_5: Add my name to your list of weaknesses.
grunt_quote_42: It’s time to learn your place in the world.
grunt_quote_42_3: Prepare yourself for a world of hurt.
grunt_quote_42_5: Your defeat comes on swift wings.
grunt_quote_43: I envy you—you get to battle me!
grunt_quote_43_2: This will be a battle I’m sure you’ll never forget.
grunt_quote_43_3: You already know this, but you don’t stand a chance.
grunt_quote_43_4: You can’t possibly match my skill, dear.
grunt_quote_43_5: I do hope you like the taste of failure!
grunt_quote_44: I will not tolerate your interference.
grunt_quote_44_2: You cannot stop me...but I’m amused by your attempt.
grunt_quote_44_3: Your professor has not prepared you for what is to come.
grunt_quote_44_4: You’ve made it this far. Let me see just how strong you are.
grunt_quote_44_5: You will never defeat Team GO Rocket.
grunt_quote_45_2: I can’t believe you fell for it!
grunt_quote_45_3: In the name of the boss, I’ll destroy you!
grunt_quote_45_5: It feels good to see you disappointed.
grunt_quote_45_6: Wanna get to the boss, do ya? You’ll have to defeat me!
grunt_quote_45_7: I’ll do anything to protect the boss!
grunt_quote_45_9: Get lost! You’ll never find him.
grunt_quote_45_10: What, did you think finding the boss was going to be that easy?

grunt_quote_51: Don’t hate us ’cause you ain’t us.
grunt_quote_51_2: I’m actually really scared of heights.
grunt_quote_51_3: To be honest, I miss standing next to a PokéStop.
grunt_quote_51_4: Flying a hot-air balloon is harder than it looks.
grunt_quote_51_5: Have you seen any weirdos around lately? One with blue hair and one with magenta hair?
